content_of_post_to_answer: What makes you feel bad and sad anytime you remember?
answer: What makes it feel bad isn’t the memory itself but the version of you it brings back. Most of these moments are emotionally unfinished, so your mind replays them not as history but as something still unresolved. I go into this pattern in more detail on my profile, in case it helps. What hurts is the gap between who you were then and what you know now.
